authentication.notes: Token created in Make account settings under Organization > API. Token is tied to user permissions.

rate_limits.error_on_exceed: HTTP 429 — 'Requests limit for organization exceeded, please try again later.'
rate_limits.notes: Rate limit resets after 1 minute. Different plans have different limits.

core_endpoints.description: Get organization details (includes rate limit info)

error_dictionary.solution: Check request body and parameter types
Verify API token is valid and has required scopes. Regenerate if needed
Check that token has the required scopes for the endpoint
Verify resource ID and organization context
Reduce request body size. Check if file size exceeds limits

error_dictionary.description: Rate limit exceeded — organization-level limit hit
error_dictionary.solution: Wait 1 minute for the limit to reset. Check license.apiLimit via GET /organizations/{id}. Consider upgrading plan for higher limits. Implement request queuing

community_constraints.issue: API endpoints reserved for paid plans — free tier limited
community_constraints.workaround: Most Make API endpoints require Core plan or higher. Free tier cannot access most API features
Make API is case-sensitive. Always use correct casing for endpoint paths as documented

use_cases: Create and manage automation scenarios programmatically
Start/stop scenarios based on external events
Monitor execution history and error rates
Manage connections, webhooks, and data stores via API
